commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

fix(nginx): remove port from proxy_pass when upstream block is defined

nginx forbids specifying a port in proxy_pass when a named upstream
block already encodes the port. Change backend:3001 → backend in all
proxy_pass directives (login block was already correct).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

🔧 fix(mslang): refactor import_module to use ModuleLoader for relative path resolution

import_module() previously used inline std::ifstream and only supported CWD-relative paths.
Now uses ModuleLoader::resolve_path() + read_source(), enabling imports relative to the
importing file. Tracks current_script_path_ across module boundaries for correct resolution.

commit.message:
Revert createMediaElementSource — caused silent audio and broke headset buttons

Connecting the audio element via createMediaElementSource() routes all
audio through the Web Audio graph. If the AudioContext is suspended
(the default in mobile WebViews even after a user gesture), audio plays
silently: the element ticks progress but nothing reaches the speakers.
The OS also sees no audible playback, so it doesn't register an active
media session and ignores hardware button events.

Keep AudioContext only for its resume() unlock role. Background playback
is handled by wasPlayingBeforeBackground + visibilitychange recovery and
the MediaSession API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use getcwd() for PHAR projectRoot in CS Fixer config

When CS Fixer runs as a PHAR, the ClassLoader reflection returns a
phar:// path. The old fallback used __DIR__/../../../../../ which only
works when php-qa-ci is a dependency (5 levels up from
vendor/lts/php-qa-ci/configDefaults/generic/ = project root). Using
getcwd() is reliable in all cases since the QA pipeline always runs
from the project root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add no-env-var rule to go-style constitution (GH-832)

Add configuration_via_yaml rule: all configuration must flow through
configuration.yaml and the Config struct; os.Getenv() is permitted only for
platform context (HOME, PATH) and, in test code, for harness-set variables.
Add corresponding checklist item and sections entry. Add
ConfigurationViaYAML field to GoStyleDoc struct so schema validation passes.
Sync embedded pkg/orchestrator/constitutions/go-style.yaml.

fix(core): pass SSL config to pg-boss for self-signed certs

pg-boss uses node-postgres which verifies certificates by default.
When sslmode=require/prefer, auto-set rejectUnauthorized: false
to support self-signed certificate environments.

repository.description: Fastest way to add a scalable backend to Next.js. Type-safe framework with auto-generated TypeScript client, instant CRUD, and file-based routing. commit.message:
feat: backfill orchestration + GDP Phase 4 fixes (#128)

* feat: add --phase=auto mode and shell orchestrator for backfill

hibernation_recovery.php changes:
- Add --phase=auto: full pipeline with parse queue wait between Phase 1
  and Phase 2 (polls adl_parse_queue every 30s until drained)
- Add --queue-timeout=N (default 240 min) and --queue-poll=N (default 30s)
- Add waitForParseQueue() with throughput estimation and ETA logging
- Warn if parse daemon PID file not found during auto mode
- Add parse daemon check before queue wait

run_backfill.sh (new):
- Shell orchestrator for Azure App Service (Kudu SSH)
- Preflight: tests ADL + PostGIS connectivity
- Starts parse_queue_gis_daemon if not running (batch=200, interval=5s)
- Extends archive delay to 48h during backfill
- Logs to /home/LogFiles/backfill_<timestamp>.log
- Post-backfill guidance (verify, reset delay, re-run Phase 3)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: GDP Phase 4 code review fixes — fairness.php + get.php bugs

fairness.php:
- Fix @eligible_pairs type mismatch (INT → BIGINT) to match SP signature
- Fix wrong column name changed_utc → change_utc (renamed in changelog migration)
- Reorder steps: populate filing_time_utc BEFORE reversal computation
  so first call returns accurate metrics instead of zeros
- Remove dead code in DEST_SWITCH param construction

get.php (pre-existing column name fixes):
- is_exempt → ctl_exempt, is_gs_hold → gs_held, is_ecr → ecr_pending
- created_at → created_utc, assigned_at → assigned_utc, updated_at → modified_utc
  (matching actual tmi_slots/tmi_flight_control schema)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Optimize JXA with batch property access and folder skip

Rewrites OmniFocus JXA data loading to use batch property access
(e.g., tasks.name() instead of per-task t.name()), reducing Apple
Event IPC calls from ~10,800 to ~15. Also skips ignored_folders
in JXA and bumps timeout from 180s to 300s.

repository.name: omnifocus_to_motion_sync
repository.description: This script bridges OmniFocus and Motion to keep your tasks aligned across platforms. It supports syncing folders, projects, and tasks with detailed conditions, handling task creation and deletion intelligently. You can run in dry_run mode to preview actions without changes, or fully synchronize in sync mode.

commit.message:
Session 21: Item 4 Phase 3 — PSQ integration + interagent ACK

psq-client.js: Worker-side proxy for PSQ scoring endpoint (POST /score,
GET /health). Forwards session_id; surfaces endpoint config errors cleanly.
worker.js: GET /psq/health + POST /psq/score routes.
wrangler.toml: [dev.vars] PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 for local dev.
psq.js: Full rewrite for machine-response/v3 — dimensions[], hierarchy
extension, raw_score artifact indicator (dotted underline), hollow radar dots
for below-threshold dimensions. Correct 10-dimension names from v3 spec.
app.js + style.css: renderPSQPanel() API, hierarchy panel, threshold styles.
item4-ack-001.json: ACK to psq-endpoint-001.json; transport decision flagged open.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
